channel.title: Obama on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in Obama on Have an average day :|

item.title: President Obama on a Christian nation.
item.description: President Obama on a Christian nation.> &# 147;And even if we did have only Christians in our midst, if we expelled every non-Christian from the United States of America, whose Christianity would we teach in the schools? Would we go with James Dobson&# 146;s, or Al Sharpton&# 146;s? Which passages of Scripture should guide our public policy? Should we go with Leviticus, which suggests slavery is ok and that eating shellfish is abomination?
